title: MeowFurniture
description: Create survival-friendly custom blocks, ores, multiblocks, crafting, and commands, with a web block generator.
body:
# 🌟 MeowFurniture — Custom Blocks! MeowFurniture Plugin lets you completely transform your Minecraft world by adding unique, survival-friendly custom blocks. Perfect for both creative and survival modes! ## ⚠️ Important Detailed setup instructions and descriptions, as well as all example blocks, can be found on the **official web generator**: [https://drraiker.github.io](https://drraiker.github.io) 🌐 ## 🎬 Trailer

❗ **Note:** The resource pack is **not included** in the plugin. It is only provided for demonstration purposes. 🎨 ## 🔹 Key Features ### 🔒 CoreProtect Support - MeowFurniture Plugin fully supports logging through **CoreProtect**. The implementation may be a bit unconventional, but it works reliably — even in case of griefing, your custom blocks can be restored! 🛠️ ### 🧱 Custom Blocks - Solid and non-solid blocks – perfect for building and decorating - Paintings & seats – create cozy rooms and lounging areas - Blocks with inventories – store items directly in decorative blocks - Hats – wear blocks as fun headgear ![furniture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007dd74e7e1c0b91faa899509ab2abb3cc4b8679.png) ![furniture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/603946262798b2cae8b1a4a7724fb0e283daa740_0.webp) ### ⛏️ Ores & World Generation - Add custom ores with configurable world generation - Ideal for survival servers and RPG worlds ### 🏗️ Multiblock Structures - Create complex multiblock constructions - Great for decorative or functional builds ![photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0398f1366ae6e269873f91c50c4676226860aaf3.png) ### 🛠️ Crafting - Customize crafting recipes for the crafting table ### ⚡ Commands & Interactivity - Execute commands on: - Click - Block placement - Block break ### 🌐 Website Block Generator [https://drraiker.github.io](https://drraiker.github.io) - Easy web-based block generator - Quickly create and customize blocks via a user-friendly(I hope) interface ### ⚡ Commands **Open Menus** - `/meow-fur` – Opens the menu of all blocks - `/mfo` – Opens the menu of all blocks **Block Examples & Placement** - `/meow-fur load-example` – Creates an example block file with all parameters - `/meow-fur place-block ` – Place a block at specific coordinates - `/meow-fur place-ore ` – Generate an ore vein at the player’s location **Reloading Blocks** - `/meow-fur reload` – Reload all blocks - `/meow-fur reload ` – Reload a single block ## Requirements [PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) || [NBT-API](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nbtapi)
